name: Friar's Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs, oil, sugar, and zucchini together.
2. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon) into a bowl.
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Grease and flour two loaf pans.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
8. Test the top with your finger before removing from the oven.
9. Allow to cool before serving. This recipe freezes well.
